Procs

proc loadModel(file: string): Node {....raises: [IOError, GltfError, KeyError,
    ValueError, CatchableError, PixieError, OSError, JsonParsingError], tags: [
    ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Loads a 3D model from a glTF file. Source   Edit   
proc loadModelBinaryFile(file: string): Node {....raises: [IOError, GltfError,
    KeyError, ValueError, CatchableError, PixieError, OSError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Loads a 3D model from a binary glTF file. Source   Edit   
proc loadModelJson(jsonRoot: JsonNode; modelDir: string;
                   externalBuffers: seq[string]): Node {....raises: [KeyError,
    GltfError, ValueError, IOError, CatchableError, PixieError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Loads a 3D model from a parsed glTF json tree. Source   Edit

    PixieError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Loads a 3D model from a json glTF file. Source   Edit

    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Reads a binary glTF file into a glTF file wrapper. Source   Edit

    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
